hooks.command: echo 'You have structural code intelligence tools available via the taoki plugin. Before reading source files, use: mcp__taoki__code_map (repo overview with tags), mcp__taoki__index (file skeleton with line numbers — 70-90% fewer tokens than reading), mcp__taoki__dependencies (import/export graph for impact analysis). Always call code_map first when exploring a codebase, and index before reading any source file.'
